name: Jami Dauber
abstract: Jami Dauber is an American jazz musician and teacher. She is the 2nd trumpet in the group Diva Jazz and plays trumpet and flugelhorn in the group Five Play.

concerts.label: Defying Gravity: A Benefit Concert for Art Start

about_quotes.speaker: Sherrie Maricle
about_quotes.evidence: I’m very lucky to have the help of Jami Dauber who’s been acting as our band manager and road manager for quite a while.
about_quotes.doc_title: Sherrie Maricle interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, June 4, 2020 [interview 2 of 2]
